zh.lifeSummary: 當Agathe de Montsoreau於1170年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易蒙左爾奧時，她的父親Guillaume de Montsoreau V30歲，母親Blandine de Courtenay16歲。她和Guillaume de Marmande I至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1210年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛馬曼德享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agathe

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Agathe de Montsoreau was born in 1170, in Montsoreau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Guillaume de Montsoreau V, was 30 and her mother, Blandine de Courtenay, was 16. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Guillaume de Marmande I. She died in 1210, in Marmande, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 40.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Guillaume de Marmande I. Elle est décédée en 1210, à Marmande, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agathe de Montsoreauが1170年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーモントソアアウで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Montsoreau Vは30歳，母Blandine de Courtenayは16歳であった。彼女はGuillaume de Marmande Iとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1210年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンマルマンドで40歳で死去した。

ko.Montsoreau, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la L: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 몽소로

ko.lifeSummary: Agathe de Montsoreau(이)가 1170년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 몽소로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume de Montsoreau V(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blandine de Courtenay(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume de Marmande I(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 마먼드에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agathe de Montsoreau родилась в 1170 г. в местности монцоро, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume de Montsoreau V было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Blandine de Courtenay, 16. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Guillaume de Marmande I. Она умерла в 1210 г. в местности марманд, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 40 лет.
